title: Brain Sucking Aliens from the Moon
description: They’ve arrived on Earth and are looking for one thing… brains!
quote: I’m afraid we’re too late, Rick. They sucked out her brain!
altHero: UFO with visible string taking off into the sky
alt1: alien with multiple eyes in a clear dome carries an unconscious woman through the trees, you can see visible ropes holding up the alien
alt2: two men shooting ray guns while another man, a scientist, holds his ears
alt4: the three men look at the woman, who is on the ground. the scientist holds up a flashlight
